title: Ability to assign an owner to a Group
excerpt:
So we are currently using Monday boards for tracking OKRs. 
The way we decided to do it is to have Boards with multiple objectives, where each group on the board is an Objective, and each pulse in that group maps to a KR…

posts.author: batjko (Patrick Metzdorf)
posts.cookedHtml:
So we are currently using Monday boards for tracking OKRs.
The way we decided to do it is to have Boards with multiple objectives, where each group on the board is an Objective, and each pulse in that group maps to a KR of said Objective.

This works ok, but we currently have no way of assigning an owner / assignee to a whole group, apart from assigning them to each KR / pulse in that group.

It would be nice to have assignees on groups.

posts.author: aerolito (hugo)
posts.cookedHtml: This feature will be awesome for us as well.

posts.author: edoaber (Edoardo Bernasconi)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 for me! Please integrate this feature, otherwise groups are basically useless…

posts.author: James2 (james)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Monday.. not enough Votes for this request? I;m using Groups as Work Packages, in the Project Board, and every work package must have an owner (an individual + department - ie two columns). This is critical in project management.

Seems to me, all that is required is to move the line that indicates each columns status alongside the “n” of Tasks underneath a collapsed Group, to be alongside the Group title.
